Class EconomyService

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.economy.service.EconomyService
All Implemented Interfaces:
EconomyAPI
public class EconomyService extends Object implements EconomyAPI
Business-logic implementation of EconomyAPI.

Validates and normalises amounts (positive, two decimal places) before delegating persistence to IEconomyRepository.

  • Constructor Details

    • EconomyService

      public EconomyService(IEconomyRepository repository, BigDecimal startingBalance, BalanceChangePublisher publisher)
      Parameters:
      repository - the persistence layer
      startingBalance - the balance seeded for a player's first-ever account row
      publisher - announces balance changes (e.g. fires a Bukkit event)

  • Method Details

    • setStartingBalance

      public void setStartingBalance(BigDecimal startingBalance)
      Updates the starting balance applied to new accounts (e.g. after a config reload).
      Parameters:
      startingBalance - the new starting balance

    • load

      public CompletableFuture<Void> load(UUID uuid)
      Ensures a player has an account row, seeded with the configured starting balance. Intended to be called when a player joins.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the account is guaranteed to exist

    • getBalance

      public CompletableFuture<BigDecimal> getBalance(UUID uuid)
      Description copied from interface: EconomyAPI
      Reads a player's balance.
      Specified by:
      getBalance in interface EconomyAPI
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      a future of the current balance (zero if the player has no account yet)

    • has

      public CompletableFuture<Boolean> has(UUID uuid, BigDecimal amount)
      Description copied from interface: EconomyAPI
      Checks whether a player can afford an amount.
      Specified by:
      has in interface EconomyAPI
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      amount - the amount to test against
      Returns:
      a future of true if the balance is greater than or equal to amount

    • deposit

      public CompletableFuture<Void> deposit(UUID uuid, BigDecimal amount)
      Description copied from interface: EconomyAPI
      Adds money to a player (e.g. a quest reward or crate payout).
      Specified by:
      deposit in interface EconomyAPI
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      amount - a positive amount
      Returns:
      a future that completes when applied

    • withdraw

      public CompletableFuture<Boolean> withdraw(UUID uuid, BigDecimal amount)
      Description copied from interface: EconomyAPI
      Removes money from a player if they can afford it (e.g. a shop purchase).
      Specified by:
      withdraw in interface EconomyAPI
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      amount - a positive amount
      Returns:
      a future of true if charged, false if funds were insufficient

    • transfer

      public CompletableFuture<Boolean> transfer(UUID from, UUID to, BigDecimal amount)
      Description copied from interface: EconomyAPI
      Moves money from one player to another, all-or-nothing.
      Specified by:
      transfer in interface EconomyAPI
      Parameters:
      from - the paying player's UUID
      to - the receiving player's UUID
      amount - a positive amount
      Returns:
      a future of true if transferred, false if the payer could not afford it

    • set

      public CompletableFuture<Void> set(UUID uuid, BigDecimal amount)
      Description copied from interface: EconomyAPI
      Overwrites a player's balance (administrative use).
      Specified by:
      set in interface EconomyAPI
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      amount - the new balance (non-negative)
      Returns:
      a future that completes when set
